title: AI Configuration
description: Manage AI Providers and models used by OpenClaw

providers.title: AI Providers
providers.emptyHint: Add your first AI provider to get started

dialog.providerNameLocked: Provider name cannot be modified. Please delete and recreate if you need to change it.
dialog.apiKeyHint: Leave empty if you don't need to change the API Key

placeholder.apiKeyEdit: Leave empty to keep existing API Key, or enter a new one

ollama.title: Ollama Setup
ollama.notInstalledDesc: Ollama was not detected on your system. You'll need to install it to run models locally.
ollama.pullingModel: Downloading model... this may take a few minutes depending on your internet connection and model size.

warnings.customUrlWithOfficialName: You are using an official Provider name but have modified the API URL. It is recommended to use a different name to avoid configuration conflicts.

validation.required: Please fill in complete Provider information and select at least one model

notes.title: Configuration Notes
notes.supportsOfficial: Supports official Providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Kimi, etc.) and custom OpenAI/Anthropic compatible APIs
notes.primaryModel: The primary model is used for Agent's default inference and can be switched at any time
notes.restart: Restart the service for configuration changes to take effect
